description: Sector overlay for insurers, reinsurers, brokers, intermediaries, policyholder documents, underwriting, claims, market conduct, AML/CFT, and policyholder protection in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Insurance. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Insurance Act, 2021 (Act 1061)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / National Insurance Commission

primary_sources.name: Anti-Money Laundering Act, 2020 (Act 1044)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Financial Intelligence Centre

primary_sources.name: Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

primary_sources.name: Companies Act, 2019 (Act 992)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Office of the Registrar of Companies

rules.title: National Insurance Commission licence or regulated-status evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NIC licence, insurer, reinsurer, broker, intermediary, authorization, or insurance regulated-status evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Policyholder disclosure, claims, or market-conduct evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for policyholder disclosure, claims handling, complaints, fair treatment, premium, benefit, or cancellation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Insurance AML/CFT or customer due diligence evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for KYC, CDD, beneficial ownership, suspicious transactions, AML policy, or sanctions screening evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Policyholder and claims-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for policyholder data, claims data, privacy notice, consent, or data protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
